title: DOG TREATS. I Woofin You.. Woofin. Dog Presents Or Dog Training Treats. Pink Doggy Cupcake By The Barking Bakery.
features: DOG GIFTS. Spoil your dog with our delightful handmade Woofin! A single Pink Topped Carob Woofin. Made to share or for the larger of our furry friends. Light sponge, topped with a tail-swishing swirl of yoghurt frosting and decorated with a crunchy peanut butter flavoured bone biscuits and heart shaped edible disc.

PRESENTS FOR DOGS. I Woofin You.. The Barking Bakery Valentines Range is the perfect way to show your pup just how much you love them. Stock up on your doggy treats - happy dog happy you! Our range includes dog treats for small dogs, medium and large.

DISCOVER THE RANGE. The Barking Bakery supply a range of puppy treats including Valentines day treats, dog Christmas gifts, personalised dog birthday cake, dog cake, popcorn, biscuits, donuts, cookies and our signature Tailswishing Woofins. Our pet treats and dog presents are the ultimate, wholesome delight for your furry friends!

SUITABLE FOR ALL OCCASIONS. Our dog Valentine Present doubles up as a dog birthday present, or a dog gift to be given all year round. Presented in our bone themed clear travel pod made from super clean 80% recycled plastic and sealed for maximum freshness. Rest assured these treats are Defra approved and suitable gifts for dogs to enjoy.

BRITISH DOGGY BAKERY. Our natural dog treats are proudly baked fresh in the North West of England, crafted from cereals, oils and fats, various sugars, milk and milk derivatives, dried egg, derivative of vegetable origin, carob powder, minerals and salt. As this is a handmade product, colours and design may vary from image.
description: Product description The Barking Bakery It started with an idea... " I used to wonder up and down the supermarket aisles looking for an unusual and tasty baked treat for my pooch to enjoy on a weekend whilst I was tucking into my takeaway and G&T, but nothing grabbed my attention so I came up with the idea for a doggy Woofin. After I baked my first one in 2012, me and Spot knew we were onto something... From those early days of baking in my kitchen at home we now have our own manufacturing plant and have steadily grown into a thriving business that sees major pet outlets sell our Woofins, pupcorn and pawty cakes along with hundreds of other independent stores, dog friendly hotels, cafes and garden centres. " Treat your wet nose furry friends to something special from our Pawtastic collection! All our treats are hand-baked in our on-site manufacturing plant based in the North West of England, UK. Made with only the finest human grade ingredients, DEFRA approved. Suitable for dogs over 3 months. Recyclable packaging. DISCOVER THE RANGE The Barking Bakery caters for all seasons - Christmas, Valentines, Birthdays, Easter.. we've got the treat for you! Our range includes treats for small, medium and large dogs. Including dog Christmas treats, dog presents, personalised dog birthday cakes, dog cake, biscuits, donuts, cookies, dog popcorn and our signature Tailswishing Woofins. NEW VALENTINES DAY COLLECTION Head over to our store to see our brand new Valentines collection for your pawfect pets! Now available: - I Woof You… Valentines Mini Iced Trios - I Woof You... Valentine Woofin - I Woof You... Valentines Domuttz - I Woof You Heart Shaped Biscuit Treats - Pink Heart Shaped Pawty Cake Spoil your dog and make sure to tag us in your photos! We cant wait to hear your reviews. Indications Training, All Life Stages, All Breed Sizes Ingredients cereals, oils and fats, various sugars, milk and milk derivatives, derivative of vegetable origin, carob powder, minerals and salt.
